docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,843.46 FILED BY CHOW, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, GLENN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $50.00 REMARKS: NO ANSWER ON THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT RUTZ, MAXIMILLIAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2025 VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GLENN CHOW. DEFENDANT MAXIMILLIAN RUTZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
